description: Onboard a Chronicom ship, Fitz and Enoch discuss the fallout from Enoch’s deal with Atarah. Fitz is furious when he discovers Simmons is being used as leverage for time-travel research, while Enoch explains that this was the only way to keep Fitz alive—emphasizing their troubled but enduring friendship.

transcript.line: Enoch. They... They... They... They won't tell me anything. Is... Is... Is Jemma okay?
Daisy Johnson and her crew have returned home. Jemma Simmons is safe, but... a prisoner on this ship.
Okay, assume that I've asked you all the questions. Tell me what happened.
The Chronicoms need you to develop a method of time travel so that we may go back and save our home world.
What does this got to do with Jemma? Why is she a prisoner? Enoch. What did you do?
I told them that you were the only one who could accomplish this task and that... that Simmons would serve well as... motivation.
It was the only way I could prevent your execution and also help my people.
On the bright side, you and Simmons will be together.
The last thing that I would ever want is for Simmons to be in danger. And you knew that. Get out.
I came here to tell you we are nearing our destination and that... I will always consider you a friend.
